candidate_definition_hints.text: This is a Phi Family of SLMs book for getting started with Phi Models. Phi a family of open sourced AI models developed by Microsoft. Phi models are the most capable and cost-effective small language models (SLMs) available, outperforming models of the same size and next size up across a variety of language, reasoning, coding, and math benchmarks
[![Open and use the samples in GitHub Codespaces](https://github.com/codespaces/badge.svg)](https://codespaces.new/microsoft/phicookbook)
